name: Rosehip, Hibiscus & Currant Pie or Cake Filling
recipeIngredient: 3 Herbal Tea Bags (a brand with hibiscus or rosehips)
1 Cup Currant Jelly, Red or Black
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil water, cinnamon, and herbal tea until the mixture is reduced to one cup.
2. Remove cinnamon and tea; add brown sugar, lemon juice, and rosehips.
3. Simmer briskly (medium heat) until water is just above rosehips.
4. Add currant jelly and stir until dissolved; continue simmering for five minutes, stirring continuously and watching carefully for scorching.
5. Blend butter and flour thoroughly.
6. Stir butter-flour mixture into the currant jelly mixture until thickened.
7. Remove from heat; ready to use.
Note #1: If avoiding extra butter, blend flour with tablespoon or more water to suspend it in the liquid. Stir flour mixture into currant mixture on heat to thicken.
Note #2: Omit butter and flour, and add chopped apple, raisins, etc., for a healthful fruit stew.
